messages.content: Summarize the offline packing pipeline in one sentence.
Offline packing groups variable-length samples into packed sequences before training to reduce padding and improve throughput.
Why does sample packing help GPU utilization?
It reduces wasted padding tokens and balances per-step compute, so GPUs spend more time processing useful tokens.

conversations.content: Name the four current top-level offline packing stages.
Split JSONL samples, compute token lengths, bin-pack by capacity, and convert packed bins to WebDataset shards.
